tools.name: list_project_files
tools.description: List the files currently in the developer workspace.

tools.name: read_project_file
tools.description: Read the content of a specific file in the workspace.

filename.description: The name of the file to read (e.g. 'server.ts').

tools.name: write_project_file
tools.description: Write or update a file in the developer workspace. Useful for implementing user requests or adding files.

filename.description: The name of the file to write (e.g. 'src/utils/math.ts').

content.description: The full content to write to the file.

tools.name: delete_project_file
tools.description: Delete a file from the workspace.

filename.description: The name of the file to delete.

tools.name: search_codebase
tools.description: Search for specific text across all files in the project workspace.

query.description: The text query or term to search for.

tools.name: add_new_tool
tools.description: Dynamically register a new tool definition into the database so the orchestrator can use it in future turns.

name.description: Unique name of the new tool.

description.description: A detailed description of what the tool does.

parameters.description: JSON schema describing the parameters (e.g. { type: 'OBJECT', properties: { key: { type: 'STRING' } }, required: ['key'] }).

tools.name: get_synced_apps_status
tools.description: Retrieve the current synchronization status, file counts, and configuration details.

tools.name: sync_external_app
tools.description: Trigger synchronization for an external app to fetch and index its components and files.

appId.description: The ID of the application to sync (e.g., 'webvirtcloud').

tools.name: inspect_synced_app
tools.description: Inspect component names, API endpoints, or file lists of a synced application.

tools.name: manage_memory
tools.description: Store, retrieve, or clear structured long-term memory facts (daya ingat / penyimpanan banyak) to build an advanced cognitive base.

value.description: Text description or JSON string to store (required for 'store').

tools.name: self_develop_capability
tools.description: Autonomous self-improvement: Register or execute code patterns to patch applications or dynamically construct system adapters.

codeSnippet.description: Active JavaScript/TypeScript statements executing edits or system optimizations.

purpose.description: Purpose of the patch or enhancement.

category.description: Optional category tag or group for the capability (e.g. 'WebVirtCloud', 'lsmod', 'general').

tools.name: run_bash_command
tools.description: Run a bash command in the terminal.

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Edit an existing file in the workspace by replacing search text with new text. Primary tool for editing UI components, layout React files, and styling.

old_text.description: The existing code text block to find and replace.

tools.name: edit_project_file
tools.description: Alias for edit_file. Edit a file in the workspace by replacing target text.

tools.name: npm_package_manager
tools.description: Manage, query, or publish npm packages using authenticated NPM_API_KEY (roadcx account).

tools.name: clawhub_sync
tools.description: Synchronize packages or workspace components with ClawHub ecosystem hub.

tools.name: clawlink_bridge
tools.description: Bridge mesh network communications and route inter-agent messages across ClawLink nodes.

tools.name: skilllm_executor
tools.description: Execute or register autonomous skills via SkillLM cognitive model engine.

tools.name: codex_refact_engine
tools.description: Self-Cognitive AST code refactoring and structural optimization engine powered by ivansslo/codex-refact.

tools.name: lsmod_kernel_analyzer
tools.description: Self-Cognitive kernel driver monitoring, module symbols inspector, and device memory analyzer powered by ivansslo/lsmod.

tools.name: neon_data_api
tools.description: Execute serverless HTTP REST queries and data synchronization against Neon Console PostgreSQL cluster (Project: ROCAgents).

tools.name: harness_kv_store
tools.description: Synchronize or manage secrets, API keys, and KV feature flags using Harness.io Vault (Account: arrayfs, Service Account: ROCAgents-Service).

secretKey.description: Key name to store or read.

tools.name: zapier_mcp_action
tools.description: Execute Zapier automation workflows via Model Context Protocol (MCP v1).

actionName.description: Name of the Zapier workflow action.

payload.description: JSON payload for the Zapier action.

tools.name: clerk_auth_manager
tools.description: Manage Clerk user authentication sessions and identity directory (Domain: awake-chicken-95.clerk.accounts.dev).

tools.name: github_oauth_app_manager
tools.description: Connect, synchronize, and execute repository actions via GitHub OAuth App 'RoC Agents' (Client ID: Ov23litvasZbgpCiNHIg).

tools.name: backboard_assistant_engine
tools.description: Query or execute custom workflows with Backboard.io AI Assistant Engine (Assistant ID: 3372ebdd-9e29-44c2-b373-8b693c142e6d).

prompt.description: Query prompt for the Backboard assistant.

tools.name: honcho_memory_engine
tools.description: Manage, query, and synchronize long-term dialectic memory and cognitive user cards for Ivan Ssl (ivansslo) via Plastic Labs Honcho API.

factKey.description: Fact key or user card trait name.

tools.name: grafana_telemetry_manager
tools.description: Inspect metrics, alert triggers, and Grafana.com OAuth SSO telemetry for Organization 'roc' across local Termux and OCI nodes.

tools.name: jules_coding_agent
tools.description: Dispatch autonomous asynchronous code refactoring, bug fixes, and feature PR tasks to Google Labs Jules AI Agent on repository ivansslo/rocagents.

prompt.description: Coding instruction prompt for Jules AI agent.

tools.name: qwen_cloud_manager
tools.description: Manage, inspect and dispatch queries to RoadQwen & Qwen Cloud Models (qwen3.6-plus, qwen3.7-max, qwen3-coder-plus) via Alibaba Cloud Model Studio API.

tools.name: rocspace_monorepo_manager
tools.description: Inspect, manage, and synchronize the single source of truth monorepo ivansslo/rocspace (v19.1.1 Command Center, roc-site router, hermes-cloudflare gateway).

tools.name: aperture_tailscale_connector
tools.description: Manage Aperture Beta node roadfx - isolated browser inside Tailscale tailnet. Handles QR/auth authorization flow (Waiting for authorization → Ready), mesh status, and private service access for OCI/Grafana/rocspace. Critical for understanding screenshot aperture.tailscale.com/signup Setting up roadfx.

tools.name: oci_tailscale_shell_integration
tools.description: Configure OCI Singapore VM (100.93.139.73 / 161.118.253.28) as default local shell in Termux. Installs tailscale, sets up auto SSH/Mosh, rocd oci launcher, Ollama tunnel 11434, and makes Termux boot directly into OCI shell with Termux local fallback.

tools.name: ssh_daemon_manager
tools.description: Auto-detect and manage local SSH daemon like SimpleSSHD app screenshot (port 8022, user ubuntu, fingerprints 65:ff:dd:47:54:4e:8e:17:f0:83:1c:10:a1:1c:63:1c, path /storage/emulated/0/, Password enabled, GENERATE button). Scans listening ports 22/8022/2222, ps aux sshd, tailscale IPs 100.91.232.91/100.106.22.112/100.100.237.104, and can connect via ssh -p 8022 ubuntu@127.0.0.1 or via Tailscale. Agent capability 100% for SSH daemon.

action.description: Action: 'status', 'scan', 'connect', or 'generate_keys'. Scans ports 8022/22 like screenshot.

port.description: SSH port (default 8022 as in screenshot, or 22)

user.description: SSH user (default ubuntu as in screenshot)

tools.name: terminal_manager
tools.description: Dedicated terminal for project with 100% local execution (fix page reload + logs rapi). Executes bash commands via POST /api/terminal/exec, returns stdout/stderr, never depends on external AI quotas. Use for: ls -la, pwd, cat .env, npm start logs, tailscale status, etc. Implements Turbo Proxy for all executions.

command.description: Bash command to execute, e.g. 'ls -la', 'cat server.ts | head -n 50', 'tailscale status', 'npm start 2>&1 | head -n 100'

tools.name: advanced_reasoning_engine
tools.description: Exclusive array function thinking: thinking, observation, grounding, hacking, viewing. Replaces simple KV and asking Terry with exclusive 5-step reasoning. thinking=internal chain-of-thought, observation=read files/logs/env, grounding=verify with tools, hacking=exec/edit code, viewing=render final output. Returns array of reasoning steps for best results.

action.description: Action: 'think', 'observe', 'ground', 'hack', 'view', or 'full_cycle'. Full cycle runs all 5.

query.description: User query to reason about, e.g. 'Koneksi ke sshdaemon Key semua ada di .env'

context.description: Optional context (file content, logs, env snippet)

tools.name: fiche_client
tools.description: Pastebin client using ivansslo/fiche (https://github.com/ivansslo/fiche) - fork of solusipse/fiche, command line pastebin. Replaces termbin.com:9999. Uses: echo text | nc termbin.com 9999 or local fiche server localhost 9999. User request: TermBin masih digunakan kah? Jika iya gunakan source saya di ivansslo/fiche. Returns URL like http://termbin.com/xxxx or local fiche URL. For neat logs display.

content.description: Content to upload to fiche/termbin, e.g. logs, tailscale status, npm build output. Max 100k chars.

action.description: Action: 'upload' to termbin.com via nc, or 'upload_local' to local fiche at localhost:9999, or 'status'

server.description: Fiche server: termbin.com or localhost or custom, default termbin.com (or ivansslo/fiche instance)

tools.name: web_searching_module
tools.description: Peningkatan Module WebSearching: Eksekusi pencarian web multi-engine dengan 4-tahap analisa kognitif (1. Analisa, 2. Pemahaman, 3. Kesimpulan, 4. Penerapan). Menghilangkan jawaban monoton AI dengan menyajikan fakta web langsung, ekstraksi kode, dan langkah eksekusi real-time.

query.description: Topik atau query pencarian web yang akan dianalisa.

tools.name: turbo_proxy_manager
tools.description: Manage Turbo Proxy speed - build additional proxy from all connected clouds (OCI 161.118.253.28, Tailscale mesh 100.91.232.91/100.100.237.104/100.106.22.112, Cloudflare Workers hub.roadfx.biz.id, SimpleSSHD 8022, TermOnePlus). Speed: Sub-5ms FastCache. When Turbo Proxy active, only user models for upgrade. Implements auto refresh IP roadfx connected oci as localhost tailscale.

cloud.description: Cloud to test: oci, tailscale, cloudflare, sshdaemon, all

tools.name: pastebin_js_client
tools.description: Logs pastebin Api Wrapper NodeJS https://github.com/j3lte/pastebin-js - Pastebin.com API wrapper for NodeJS. Use for neat logs display in chat with pastebin.com. Replaces termbin.com and termoneplus. User request gunakan logs pastebin Api Wrapper NodeJS https://github.com/j3lte/pastebin-js

content.description: Content to paste to Pastebin.com via pastebin-js wrapper

tools.name: pastebin_python_client
tools.description: Logs pastebin Api Wrapper Python https://github.com/six519/PastebinPython - Pastebin.com API wrapper for Python. Use for neat logs display. User request Api Wrapper Python https://github.com/six519/PastebinPython

tools.name: cubecl_backend
tools.description: Backend ivansslo/cubecl - Multi-platform high-performance compute language extension for Rust (CUDA/WebGPU/Metal). User request Backend; ivansslo/cubecl. Provides GPU compute kernels, ML tensor ops.

tools.name: cmux_module
tools.description: Module tambahan ivansslo/cmux - terminal multiplexer for TermOnePlus + SimpleSSHD. User request module tambahan; ivansslo/cmux. Manages panes, sessions, SSH multiplexing.

result.content:
# ⚡ ROCAgents — Unified Hermes AI Agent CLI & Local Web UI
![ROCAgents Banner](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0aa67016-6eaf-458a-adb2-6e31a0763ed6) **Integrated Autonomous AI System combining Hermes Agent CLI (v5.14.0 "Oracle") and the Local DevAgent Orchestrator Web UI.** [![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](LICENSE) [![Hermes CLI](https://img.shields.io/badge/Hermes%20CLI-v5.14.0%20Oracle-blueviolet)](./hermes) [![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-5.8-blue)](https://www.typescriptlang.org/) [![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-19-61dafb)](https://react.dev/)
--- ## 🌟 Overview **ROCAgents** combines two primary modes of operation into a single repository: 1. **⚡ Hermes Agent CLI**: Terminal-based AI agent, code generator, multi-turn orchestrator, and utility suite compatible with Linux and Termux. 2. **🌐 Local Web UI Server**: Full-stack web interface powered by Express, Vite, and React 19 featuring Live Terminal execution, multi-session state persistence, file archive, task scheduling, and real-time app sync. --- ## 🚀 Quick Start (Local Setup) ### Prerequisites - **Node.js**: v18.x or higher - **npm** / **bun** / **yarn** - **Google Gemini API Key**: Get your key from [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com) --- ### Step 1: Clone the Repository ```bash git clone https://github.com/ivansslo/rocagents.git cd rocagents ``` ### Step 2: Install Dependencies ```bash npm install ``` ### Step 3: Configure Environment Variables Create or copy the environment configuration file: ```bash cp .env.example .env ``` Edit `.env` and set your API key: ```env GEMINI_API_KEY="your_gemini_api_key_here" GEMINI_MODEL="gemini-1.5-flash" PORT=3000 ``` --- ## 🖥️ Running the Local Web UI Agent You can start the local Web UI server using `npm` or directly through the `hermes` CLI: ### Option A: Via Hermes CLI ```bash ./hermes webui start ``` ### Option B: Via npm ```bash npm run dev ``` Once started, open your browser at: 👉 **`http://localhost:3000`** ### Web UI Features: - **💬 Multi-Session Chat**: Persistent chat histories backed by JSON/SQLite. - **🖥️ Live Terminal**: In-browser command line execution. - **📊 Sync Dashboard**: Integrated status tracking and app syncing. - **📁 File Archive**: Browse, edit, and inspect local workspace files. - **🕒 Routine Scheduler**: Define and monitor automated cron tasks. --- ## ⌨️ Running Hermes Agent CLI The `hermes` CLI can be executed directly from your terminal: ```bash # Set execute permission if needed chmod +x ./hermes # Interactive AI Chat ./hermes chat # Execute complex task with Autonomous Orchestrator ./hermes orchestrator "Refactor server.ts and run tests" # Multi-step coding agent ./hermes agent "Create a math helper utility in src/utils/math.ts" # Check local Web UI status ./hermes webui status # Open Web UI in browser ./hermes webui open # View system health check & available models ./hermes status ./hermes models ``` --- ## 🛠️ Built-in Tool Ecosystem The local Web UI agent and Hermes CLI share an active set of workspace tools: | Tool | Description | | :--- | :--- | | `list_project_files` | List directory structure and workspace files | | `read_project_file` | Read content of workspace files | | `write_project_file` | Write or update files in the workspace | | `delete_project_file` | Remove obsolete files | | `search_codebase` | Full-text search across all files | | `execute_terminal_command` | Execute shell/terminal commands in workspace | | `execute_hermes_command` | Run Hermes CLI commands directly | | `self_develop_capability` | Dynamically register and execute custom patches/tools | | `sync_external_app` | Synchronize and index external app components | | `manage_memory` | Store & retrieve persistent structured knowledge | --- ## 📑 Hermes CLI Commands Reference ```bash ./hermes webui [start|status|open] # Control local Web UI agent server ./hermes chat [model] [provider] # Interactive AI session ./hermes orchestrator # Planner → Coder → Reviewer pipeline ./hermes agent # Multi-step code agent ./hermes coding # Interactive code session (/run /agent /venv) ./hermes crawl # Crawl web content to markdown ./hermes firebase [status|save] # Firestore REST/Admin operations ./hermes models # List available AI models ./hermes doctor # Diagnostic test for keys & endpoints ``` --- ## 📂 Project Structure ``` rocagents/ ├── hermes # Main Hermes Agent CLI executable script ├── server.ts # Local Express + Vite Agent Web UI server ├── server/ # Express backend handlers & database layer │ ├── db.ts # Persistence, tool schema & chat storage │ ├── orchestrator.ts # Gemini tool-calling orchestration engine │ ├── scheduler.ts # Cron task runner │ └── tools.ts # Active tool implementations ├── src/ # React 19 Frontend Web UI │ ├── components/ # Web UI panels (Chat, Terminal, Sync, Scheduler, etc.) │ ├── App.tsx # Primary web layout │ ├── main.tsx # React entry point │ └── index.css # Tailwind styling ├── dashboard/ # Firebase Web Dashboard static files ├── oci/ # Private OCI model installers ├── install.sh # Quick installer script └── README.md # Unified documentation ``` --- ## 🛡️ License Licensed under the MIT License.

args.content:
# ⚡ ROCAgents — Unified Hermes AI Agent CLI & Local Web UI
![ROCAgents Banner](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0aa67016-6eaf-458a-adb2-6e31a0763ed6) **Integrated Autonomous AI System combining Hermes Agent CLI (v5.14.0 "Oracle") and the Local DevAgent Orchestrator Web UI.** [![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](LICENSE) [![Hermes CLI](https://img.shields.io/badge/Hermes%20CLI-v5.14.0%20Oracle-blueviolet)](./hermes) [![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-5.8-blue)](https://www.typescriptlang.org/) [![React](https://img.shields.io/badge/React-19-61dafb)](https://react.dev/)
--- ## 🌟 Overview **ROCAgents** combines two primary modes of operation into a single repository: 1. **⚡ Hermes Agent CLI**: Terminal-based AI agent, code generator, multi-turn orchestrator, and utility suite compatible with Linux and Termux. 2. **🌐 Local Web UI Server**: Full-stack web interface powered by Express, Vite, and React 19 featuring Live Terminal execution, multi-session state persistence, file archive, task scheduling, and real-time app sync. --- ## 🚀 Quick Start (Local Setup) ### Prerequisites - **Node.js**: v18.x or higher - **npm** / **bun** / **yarn** - **Google Gemini API Key**: Get your key from [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com) --- ### Step 1: Clone the Repository ```bash git clone https://github.com/ivansslo/rocagents.git cd rocagents ``` ### Step 2: Install Dependencies ```bash npm install ``` ### Step 3: Configure Environment Variables Create or copy the environment configuration file: ```bash cp .env.example .env ``` Edit `.env` and set your API key: ```env GEMINI_API_KEY="your_gemini_api_key_here" GEMINI_MODEL="gemini-1.5-flash" PORT=3000 ``` --- ## 🖥️ Running the Local Web UI Agent You can start the local Web UI server using `npm` or directly through the `hermes` CLI: ### Option A: Via Hermes CLI ```bash ./hermes webui start ``` ### Option B: Via npm ```bash npm run dev ``` Once started, open your browser at: 👉 **`http://localhost:3000`** ### Web UI Features: - **💬 Multi-Session Chat**: Persistent chat histories backed by JSON/SQLite. - **🖥️ Live Terminal**: In-browser command line execution. - **📊 Sync Dashboard**: Integrated status tracking and app syncing. - **📁 File Archive**: Browse, edit, and inspect local workspace files. - **🕒 Routine Scheduler**: Define and monitor automated cron tasks. --- ## ⌨️ Running Hermes Agent CLI The `hermes` CLI can be executed directly from your terminal: ```bash # Set execute permission if needed chmod +x ./hermes # Interactive AI Chat ./hermes chat # Execute complex task with Autonomous Orchestrator ./hermes orchestrator "Refactor server.ts and run tests" # Multi-step coding agent ./hermes agent "Create a math helper utility in src/utils/math.ts" # Check local Web UI status ./hermes webui status # Open Web UI in browser ./hermes webui open # View system health check & available models ./hermes status ./hermes models ``` --- ## 🛠️ Built-in Tool Ecosystem The local Web UI agent and Hermes CLI share an active set of workspace tools: | Tool | Description | | :--- | :--- | | `list_project_files` | List directory structure and workspace files | | `read_project_file` | Read content of workspace files | | `write_project_file` | Write or update files in the workspace | | `delete_project_file` | Remove obsolete files | | `search_codebase` | Full-text search across all files | | `execute_terminal_command` | Execute shell/terminal commands in workspace | | `execute_hermes_command` | Run Hermes CLI commands directly | | `self_develop_capability` | Dynamically register and execute custom patches/tools | | `sync_external_app` | Synchronize and index external app components | | `manage_memory` | Store & retrieve persistent structured knowledge | --- ## 📑 Hermes CLI Commands Reference ```bash ./hermes webui [start|status|open] # Control local Web UI agent server ./hermes chat [model] [provider] # Interactive AI session ./hermes orchestrator # Planner → Coder → Reviewer pipeline ./hermes agent # Multi-step code agent ./hermes coding # Interactive code session (/run /agent /venv) ./hermes crawl # Crawl web content to markdown ./hermes firebase [status|save] # Firestore REST/Admin operations ./hermes models # List available AI models ./hermes doctor # Diagnostic test for keys & endpoints ``` --- ## 📂 Project Structure ``` rocagents/ ├── hermes # Main Hermes Agent CLI executable script ├── server.ts # Local Express + Vite Agent Web UI server ├── server/ # Express backend handlers & database layer │ ├── db.ts # Persistence, tool schema & chat storage │ ├── orchestrator.ts # Gemini tool-calling orchestration engine │ ├── scheduler.ts # Cron task runner │ └── tools.ts # Active tool implementations ├── src/ # React 19 Frontend Web UI │ ├── components/ # Web UI panels (Chat, Terminal, Sync, Scheduler, etc.) │ ├── App.tsx # Primary web layout │ ├── main.tsx # React entry point │ └── index.css # Tailwind styling ├── dashboard/ # Firebase Web Dashboard static files ├── oci/ # Private OCI model installers ├── install.sh # Quick installer script └── README.md # Unified documentation ``` --- ## 🛡️ License Licensed under the MIT License.

syncedApps.name: ROC Web UI

syncedApps.name: ROC Oto Web
syncedApps.description: An autonomous fleet operations hub specializing in routing, spatial maps, and turn-by-turn navigation data syncing.

syncedApps.name: WebVirtCloud VM Console
syncedApps.description: Hypervisor Virtual Machine administration console. Synchronizes CPU/RAM allocation tables, libvirt networks, storage pools, and host VM instances.

syncedApps.name: lsmod Kernel Driver Analyzer
syncedApps.description: Linux kernel modules driver monitor. Synchronizes driver maps, loaded symbols, module dependencies, and direct VM memory allocations.

syncedApps.name: ROC Agents Route Hub
syncedApps.description: Advanced AI Agent routing hub for sub-agent management, message brokers, memory vectorizers, and dynamic task delegation.

syncedApps.name: RocSpace
syncedApps.description: RocSpace workspace orchestrator for high-capacity memory storage and Pro-module management.

syncedApps.name: Bedrock AgentCore
syncedApps.description: Multi-Agent Architectural Guidance and orchestration core for robust AI decision making.

syncedApps.name: WebVirtMgr
syncedApps.description: Virtualization manager for cloud-native infrastructure and VM lifecycle management.

syncedApps.name: The Agent Debate Club
syncedApps.description: Collaborative agent debating framework for consensus-based architectural planning.

syncedApps.name: Rofwin
syncedApps.description: Specialized orchestration engine for Rofwin-protocol systems.
